165: // ListTargets implements the interface pbs.TargetServiceServer.
166: func (s Service) ListTargets(ctx context.Context, req *pbs.ListTargetsRequest) (*pbs.ListTargetsResponse, error) {
167: 	const op = "targets.(Service).ListSessions"
168: 
169: 	if err := validateListRequest(req); err != nil {
170: 		return nil, err
171: 	}
172: 	authResults := s.authResult(ctx, req.GetScopeId(), action.List)
173: 	if authResults.Error != nil {
174: 		// If it's forbidden, and it's a recursive request, and they're
175: 		// successfully authenticated but just not authorized, keep going as we
176: 		// may have authorization on downstream scopes. Or, if they've not
177: 		// authenticated, still process in case u_anon has permissions.
178: 		if (authResults.Error == handlers.ForbiddenError() || authResults.Error == handlers.UnauthenticatedError()) &&
179: 			req.GetRecursive() &&
180: 			authResults.AuthenticationFinished {
181: 		} else {
182: 			return nil, authResults.Error
183: 		}
184: 	}
185: 
186: 	var err error
187: 	var authzScopes map[string]*scopes.ScopeInfo
188: 	if req.GetRecursive() {
189: 		authzScopes, err = authResults.ScopesAuthorizedForList(ctx, req.GetScopeId(), resource.Target)
190: 	} else {
191: 		authzScopes = map[string]*scopes.ScopeInfo{authResults.Scope.Id: authResults.Scope}
192: 	}
193: 	if err != nil {
194: 		return nil, err
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	// Get all user permissions for the requested scope(s).
198: 	userPerms := authResults.ACL().ListPermissions(authzScopes, resource.Target, IdActions)
199: 	if len(userPerms) == 0 {
200: 		return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{}, nil
201: 	}
202: 
203: 	tl, err := s.listFromRepo(ctx, userPerms)
204: 	if err != nil {
205: 		return nil, err
206: 	}
207: 	if len(tl) == 0 {
208: 		return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{}, nil
209: 	}
210: 
211: 	filter, err := handlers.NewFilter(req.GetFilter())
212: 	if err != nil {
213: 		return nil, err
214: 	}
215: 
216: 	finalItems := make([]*pb.Target, 0, len(tl))
217: 	for _, item := range tl {
218: 		pr := perms.Resource{Id: item.GetPublicId(), ScopeId: item.GetProjectId(), Type: resource.Target}
219: 		outputFields := authResults.FetchOutputFields(pr, action.List).SelfOrDefaults(authResults.UserId)
220: 
221: 		outputOpts := make([]handlers.Option, 0, 3)
222: 		outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithOutputFields(&outputFields))
223: 
224: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.ScopeField) {
225: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithScope(authzScopes[item.GetProjectId()]))
226: 		}
227: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.AuthorizedActionsField) {
228: 			authorizedActions := authResults.FetchActionSetForId(ctx, item.GetPublicId(), IdActions, auth.WithResource(&pr)).Strings()
229: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithAuthorizedActions(authorizedActions))
230: 		}
231: 
232: 		item, err := toProto(ctx, item, nil, nil, outputOpts...)
233: 		if err != nil {
234: 			return nil, err
235: 		}
236: 
237: 		filterable, err := subtypes.Filterable(item)
238: 		if err != nil {
239: 			return nil, err
240: 		}
241: 		if filter.Match(filterable) {
242: 			finalItems = append(finalItems, item)
243: 		}
244: 	}
245: 
246: 	return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{Items: finalItems}, nil
247: }

742: func (s Service) AuthorizeSession(ctx context.Context, req *pbs.AuthorizeSessionRequest) (*pbs.AuthorizeSessionResponse, error) {
743: 	const op = "targets.(Service).AuthorizeSession"
744: 	if err := validateAuthorizeSessionRequest(req); err != nil {
745: 		return nil, err
746: 	}
747: 	authResults := s.authResult(ctx, req.GetId(), action.AuthorizeSession,
748: 		target.WithName(req.GetName()),
749: 		target.WithProjectId(req.GetScopeId()),
750: 		target.WithProjectName(req.GetScopeName()),
751: 	)
752: 	if authResults.Error != nil {
753: 		return nil, authResults.Error
754: 	}
755: 
756: 	if authResults.RoundTripValue == nil {
757: 		return nil, stderrors.New("authorize session: expected to get a target back from auth results")
758: 	}
759: 	t, ok := authResults.RoundTripValue.(target.Target)
760: 	if !ok {
761: 		return nil, stderrors.New("authorize session: round tripped auth results value is not a target")
762: 	}
763: 	if t == nil {
764: 		return nil, stderrors.New("authorize session: round tripped target is nil")
765: 	}
766: 
767: 	// This could happen if, say, u_recovery was used or u_anon was granted. But
768: 	// don't allow it. It's one thing if grants give access to resources within
769: 	// Boundary, even if those could eventually be used to provide an unintended
770: 	// user access to a remote system. It's quite another to enable anonymous
771: 	// access directly to a remote system.
772: 	//
773: 	// Note that even if u_anon or u_auth are given grants we can still validate
774: 	// a token! So this is just checking that a valid token was provided. The
775: 	// actual reality of this works out to excluding:
776: 	//
777: 	// * True anonymous access (no token provided and u_anon)
778: 	//
779: 	// * u_recovery access (which is fine, recovery is meant for recovering
780: 	// system state, no real reason to allow it to then connect to systems)
781: 	if authResults.AuthTokenId == "" {
782: 		return nil, handlers.ForbiddenError()
783: 	}
784: 
785: 	// Get the target information
786: 	repo, err := s.repoFn()
787: 	if err != nil {
788: 		return nil, err
789: 	}
790: 	t, hostSources, credSources, err := repo.LookupTarget(ctx, t.GetPublicId())
791: 	if err != nil {
792: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
793: 			return nil, handlers.NotFoundErrorf("Target %q not found.", t.GetPublicId())
794: 		}
795: 		return nil, err
796: 	}
797: 	if t == nil {
798: 		return nil, handlers.NotFoundErrorf("Target %q not found.", t.GetPublicId())
799: 	}
800: 
801: 	// Instantiate some repos
802: 	sessionRepo, err := s.sessionRepoFn()
803: 	if err != nil {
804: 		return nil, err
805: 	}
806: 	serversRepo, err := s.serversRepoFn()
807: 	if err != nil {
808: 		return nil, err
809: 	}
810: 
811: 	// First ensure we can actually service a request, that is, we have workers
812: 	// available (after any filtering). WorkerInfo only contains the address;
813: 	// worker IDs below is used to contain their IDs in the same order. This is
814: 	// used to fetch tags for filtering. But we avoid allocation unless we
815: 	// actually need it.
816: 	selectedWorkers, err := serversRepo.ListWorkers(ctx, []string{scope.Global.String()})
817: 	if err != nil {
818: 		return nil, err
819: 	}
820: 
821: 	if len(t.GetWorkerFilter()) > 0 && len(selectedWorkers) > 0 {
822: 		eval, err := bexpr.CreateEvaluator(t.GetWorkerFilter())
823: 		if err != nil {
824: 			return nil, err
825: 		}
826: 		selectedWorkers, err = workerList(selectedWorkers).filtered(eval)
827: 		if err != nil {
828: 			return nil, err
829: 		}
830: 	}
831: 
832: 	if len(selectedWorkers) == 0 {
833: 		return nil, handlers.ApiErrorWithCodeAndMessage(
834: 			codes.FailedPrecondition,
835: 			"No workers are available to handle this session, or all have been filtered.")
836: 	}
837: 
838: 	requestedId := req.GetHostId()
839: 	staticHostRepo, err := s.staticHostRepoFn()
840: 	if err != nil {
841: 		return nil, err
842: 	}
843: 	pluginHostRepo, err := s.pluginHostRepoFn()
844: 	if err != nil {
845: 		return nil, err
846: 	}
847: 
848: 	var pluginHostSetIds []string
849: 	var endpoints []*host.Endpoint
850: 	for _, hSource := range hostSources {
851: 		hsId := hSource.Id()
852: 		// FIXME: read in type from DB rather than rely on prefix
853: 		switch subtypes.SubtypeFromId(hostDomain, hsId) {
854: 		case static.Subtype:
855: 			eps, err := staticHostRepo.Endpoints(ctx, hsId)
856: 			if err != nil {
857: 				return nil, err
858: 			}
859: 			endpoints = append(endpoints, eps...)
860: 		default:
861: 			// Batch the plugin host set ids since each round trip to the plugin
862: 			// has the potential to be expensive.
863: 			pluginHostSetIds = append(pluginHostSetIds, hsId)
864: 		}
865: 	}
866: 	if len(pluginHostSetIds) > 0 {
867: 		eps, err := pluginHostRepo.Endpoints(ctx, pluginHostSetIds)
868: 		if err != nil {
869: 			return nil, err
870: 		}
871: 		endpoints = append(endpoints, eps...)
872: 	}
873: 
874: 	var chosenEndpoint *host.Endpoint
875: 	if requestedId != "" {
876: 		for _, ep := range endpoints {
877: 			if ep.HostId == requestedId {
878: 				chosenEndpoint = ep
879: 			}
880: 		}
881: 		if chosenEndpoint == nil {
882: 			// We didn't find it
883: 			return nil, handlers.InvalidArgumentErrorf(
884: 				"Errors in provided fields.",
885: 				map[string]string{
886: 					"host_id": "The requested host id is not available.",
887: 				})
888: 		}
889: 	}
890: 
891: 	if chosenEndpoint == nil {
892: 		if len(endpoints) == 0 {
893: 			// No hosts were found, error
894: 			return nil, handlers.NotFoundErrorf("No endpoint found from available target host sources.")
895: 		}
896: 		chosenEndpoint = endpoints[rand.Intn(len(endpoints))]
897: 	}
898: 
899: 	h, p, err := net.SplitHostPort(chosenEndpoint.Address)
900: 	switch {
901: 	case err != nil && strings.Contains(err.Error(), missingPortErrStr):
902: 		if t.GetDefaultPort() == 0 {
903: 			return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, fmt.Sprintf("neither the selected host %q nor the target provides a port to use", chosenEndpoint.HostId))
904: 		}
905: 		h = chosenEndpoint.Address
906: 		p = strconv.FormatUint(uint64(t.GetDefaultPort()), 10)
907: 	case err != nil:
908: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("error when parsing the chosen endpoints host address"))
909: 	}
910: 	// Generate the endpoint URL
911: 	endpointUrl := &url.URL{
912: 		Scheme: t.GetType().String(),
913: 		Host:   net.JoinHostPort(h, p),
914: 	}
915: 
916: 	for _, extraFilter := range ExtraWorkerFilters {
917: 		selectedWorkers, err = extraFilter(ctx, selectedWorkers, h, p)
918: 		if err != nil {
919: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("error executing extra worker filter"))
920: 		}
921: 		if len(selectedWorkers) == 0 {
922: 			return nil, handlers.ApiErrorWithCodeAndMessage(
923: 				codes.FailedPrecondition,
924: 				"No workers are available to handle this session, or all have been filtered.")
925: 		}
926: 	}
927: 
928: 	var vaultReqs []credential.Request
929: 	var staticIds []string
930: 	var dynCreds []*session.DynamicCredential
931: 	var staticCreds []*session.StaticCredential
932: 	for _, cs := range credSources {
933: 		switch cs.Type() {
934: 		case target.LibraryCredentialSourceType:
935: 			vaultReqs = append(vaultReqs, credential.Request{
936: 				SourceId: cs.Id(),
937: 				Purpose:  cs.CredentialPurpose(),
938: 			})
939: 			dynCreds = append(dynCreds, session.NewDynamicCredential(cs.Id(), cs.CredentialPurpose()))
940: 		case target.StaticCredentialSourceType:
941: 			staticIds = append(staticIds, cs.Id())
942: 			staticCreds = append(staticCreds, session.NewStaticCredential(cs.Id(), cs.CredentialPurpose()))
943: 		}
944: 	}
945: 
946: 	expTime := timestamppb.Now()
947: 	expTime.Seconds += int64(t.GetSessionMaxSeconds())
948: 	sessionComposition := session.ComposedOf{
949: 		UserId:             authResults.UserId,
950: 		HostId:             chosenEndpoint.HostId,
951: 		TargetId:           t.GetPublicId(),
952: 		HostSetId:          chosenEndpoint.SetId,
953: 		AuthTokenId:        authResults.AuthTokenId,
954: 		ProjectId:          authResults.Scope.Id,
955: 		Endpoint:           endpointUrl.String(),
956: 		ExpirationTime:     &timestamp.Timestamp{Timestamp: expTime},
957: 		ConnectionLimit:    t.GetSessionConnectionLimit(),
958: 		WorkerFilter:       t.GetWorkerFilter(),
959: 		DynamicCredentials: dynCreds,
960: 		StaticCredentials:  staticCreds,
961: 	}
962: 
963: 	sess, err := session.New(sessionComposition)
964: 	if err != nil {
965: 		return nil, err
966: 	}
967: 	wrapper, err := s.kmsCache.GetWrapper(ctx, authResults.Scope.Id, kms.KeyPurposeSessions)
968: 	if err != nil {
969: 		return nil, err
970: 	}
971: 	sess, privKey, err := sessionRepo.CreateSession(ctx, wrapper, sess, workerList(selectedWorkers).addresses())
972: 	if err != nil {
973: 		return nil, err
974: 	}
975: 
976: 	var dynamic []credential.Dynamic
977: 	var staticCredsById map[string]credential.Static
978: 	if len(vaultReqs) > 0 {
979: 		credRepo, err := s.vaultCredRepoFn()
980: 		if err != nil {
981: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
982: 		}
983: 		dynamic, err = credRepo.Issue(ctx, sess.GetPublicId(), vaultReqs)
984: 		if err != nil {
985: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
986: 		}
987: 	}
988: 
989: 	if len(staticIds) > 0 {
990: 		credRepo, err := s.staticCredRepoFn()
991: 		if err != nil {
992: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
993: 		}
994: 
995: 		// Remove duplicate requests
996: 		staticIds = strutil.RemoveDuplicates(staticIds, false)
997: 		creds, err := credRepo.Retrieve(ctx, t.GetProjectId(), staticIds)
998: 		if err != nil {
999: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1000: 		}
1001: 
1002: 		staticCredsById = make(map[string]credential.Static)
1003: 		for _, c := range creds {
1004: 			staticCredsById[c.GetPublicId()] = c
1005: 		}
1006: 	}
1007: 
1008: 	var creds []*pb.SessionCredential
1009: 	var workerCreds []session.Credential
1010: 	for _, cred := range dynamic {
1011: 		switch cred.Purpose() {
1012: 		case credential.InjectedApplicationPurpose:
1013: 			c, err := dynamicToWorkerCredential(ctx, cred)
1014: 			if err != nil {
1015: 				return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1016: 			}
1017: 			workerCreds = append(workerCreds, c)
1018: 
1019: 		case credential.BrokeredPurpose:
1020: 			c, err := dynamicToSessionCredential(ctx, cred)
1021: 			if err != nil {
1022: 				return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1023: 			}
1024: 			creds = append(creds, c)
1025: 
1026: 		default:
1027: 			return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.Unknown, op, fmt.Sprintf("unsupported credential purpose %s", cred.Purpose()))
1028: 		}
1029: 	}
1030: 
1031: 	for _, sc := range staticCreds {
1032: 		switch sc.CredentialPurpose {
1033: 		case string(credential.InjectedApplicationPurpose):
1034: 			c, err := staticToWorkerCredential(ctx, staticCredsById[sc.CredentialStaticId])
1035: 			if err != nil {
1036: 				return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1037: 			}
1038: 			workerCreds = append(workerCreds, c)
1039: 
1040: 		case string(credential.BrokeredPurpose):
1041: 			c, err := staticToSessionCredential(ctx, staticCredsById[sc.CredentialStaticId])
1042: 			if err != nil {
1043: 				return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1044: 			}
1045: 			creds = append(creds, c)
1046: 
1047: 		default:
1048: 			return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.Unknown, op, fmt.Sprintf("unsupported credential purpose %s", sc.CredentialPurpose))
1049: 		}
1050: 	}
1051: 
1052: 	if len(workerCreds) > 0 {
1053: 		// store credentials in repo, worker will request creds when a connection is established
1054: 		err = sessionRepo.AddSessionCredentials(ctx, sess.ProjectId, sess.PublicId, workerCreds)
1055: 		if err != nil {
1056: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
1057: 		}
1058: 	}
1059: 
1060: 	sad := &pb.SessionAuthorizationData{
1061: 		SessionId:       sess.PublicId,
1062: 		TargetId:        t.GetPublicId(),
1063: 		Scope:           authResults.Scope,
1064: 		CreatedTime:     sess.CreateTime.GetTimestamp(),
1065: 		Type:            t.GetType().String(),
1066: 		Certificate:     sess.Certificate,
1067: 		PrivateKey:      privKey,
1068: 		HostId:          chosenEndpoint.HostId,
1069: 		Endpoint:        endpointUrl.String(),
1070: 		WorkerInfo:      workerList(selectedWorkers).workerInfos(),
1071: 		ConnectionLimit: t.GetSessionConnectionLimit(),
1072: 	}
1073: 	marshaledSad, err := proto.Marshal(sad)
1074: 	if err != nil {
1075: 		return nil, err
1076: 	}
1077: 	encodedMarshaledSad := base58.FastBase58Encoding(marshaledSad)
1078: 
1079: 	ret := &pb.SessionAuthorization{
1080: 		SessionId:          sess.PublicId,
1081: 		TargetId:           t.GetPublicId(),
1082: 		Scope:              authResults.Scope,
1083: 		CreatedTime:        sess.CreateTime.GetTimestamp(),
1084: 		Type:               t.GetType().String(),
1085: 		AuthorizationToken: encodedMarshaledSad,
1086: 		UserId:             authResults.UserId,
1087: 		HostId:             chosenEndpoint.HostId,
1088: 		HostSetId:          chosenEndpoint.SetId,
1089: 		Endpoint:           endpointUrl.String(),
1090: 		Credentials:        creds,
1091: 	}
1092: 	return &pbs.AuthorizeSessionResponse{Item: ret}, nil
1093: }

1117: 		opts = append(opts, target.WithDescription(item.GetDescription().GetValue()))
1118: 	}
1119: 	if item.GetSessionMaxSeconds() != nil {
1120: 		opts = append(opts, target.WithSessionMaxSeconds(item.GetSessionMaxSeconds().GetValue()))
1121: 	}
1122: 	if item.GetSessionConnectionLimit() != nil {
1123: 		opts = append(opts, target.WithSessionConnectionLimit(item.GetSessionConnectionLimit().GetValue()))
1124: 	}
1125: 	if item.GetWorkerFilter() != nil {
1126: 		opts = append(opts, target.WithWorkerFilter(item.GetWorkerFilter().GetValue()))
1127: 	}
1128: 
1129: 	attr, err := subtypeRegistry.newAttribute(target.SubtypeFromType(item.GetType()), item.GetAttrs())
1130: 	if err != nil {
1131: 		return nil, nil, nil, handlers.ApiErrorWithCodeAndMessage(codes.InvalidArgument, err.Error())
1132: 	}
1133: 	opts = append(opts, attr.Options()...)
1134: 
1135: 	u, err := target.New(ctx, target.SubtypeFromType(item.GetType()), item.GetScopeId(), opts...)
1136: 	if err != nil {
1137: 		return nil, nil, nil, handlers.ApiErrorWithCodeAndMessage(codes.Internal, "Unable to build target for creation: %v.", err)
1138: 	}
1139: 	repo, err := s.repoFn()
1140: 	if err != nil {
1141: 		return nil, nil, nil, err
1142: 	}
1143: 	out, hs, cl, err := repo.CreateTarget(ctx, u)

232: 					pluginutil.WithPluginsFilesystem(host_plugin_assets.HostPluginPrefix, host_plugin_assets.FileSystem()),
233: 				),
234: 				external_host_plugins.WithLogger(pluginLogger.Named(pluginType)),
235: 			)
236: 			if err != nil {
237: 				return nil, fmt.Errorf("error creating %s host plugin: %w", pluginType, err)
238: 			}
239: 			conf.ShutdownFuncs = append(conf.ShutdownFuncs, cleanup)
240: 			if _, err := conf.RegisterHostPlugin(ctx, pluginType, client, hostplugin.WithDescription(fmt.Sprintf("Built-in %s host plugin", enabledPlugin.String()))); err != nil {
241: 				return nil, fmt.Errorf("error registering %s host plugin: %w", pluginType, err)
242: 			}
243: 		}
244: 	}
245: 
246: 	if conf.HostPlugins == nil {
247: 		conf.HostPlugins = make(map[string]plugin.HostPluginServiceClient)
248: 	}
249: 
250: 	// Set up repo stuff
251: 	dbase := db.New(c.conf.Database)
252: 	c.kms, err = kms.New(ctx, dbase, dbase)
253: 	if err != nil {
254: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error creating kms cache: %w", err)
255: 	}
256: 	if err := c.kms.AddExternalWrappers(
257: 		ctx,
258: 		kms.WithRootWrapper(c.conf.RootKms),
259: 		kms.WithWorkerAuthWrapper(c.conf.WorkerAuthKms),
260: 		kms.WithRecoveryWrapper(c.conf.RecoveryKms),
261: 	); err != nil {
262: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error adding config keys to kms: %w", err)
263: 	}
264: 
265: 	// we need to get all the scopes so we can reconcile the DEKs for each scope.
266: 	iamRepo, err := iam.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms, iam.WithRandomReader(c.conf.SecureRandomReader))
267: 	if err != nil {
268: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to initialize iam repository: %w", err)
269: 	}
270: 	allScopes, err := iamRepo.ListScopesRecursively(ctx, scope.Global.String())
271: 	if err != nil {
272: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error listing all scopes for reconciling keys: %w", err)
273: 	}
274: 	reconcileScopeIds := make([]string, 0, len(allScopes))
275: 	for _, s := range allScopes {
276: 		reconcileScopeIds = append(reconcileScopeIds, s.PublicId)
277: 	}
278: 	if err := c.kms.ReconcileKeys(ctx, c.conf.SecureRandomReader, kms.WithScopeIds(reconcileScopeIds...)); err != nil {
279: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error reconciling kms keys: %w", err)
280: 	}
281: 
282: 	// now that the kms is configured, we can get the audit wrapper and rotate
283: 	// the eventer audit wrapper, so the emitted events can include encrypt and
284: 	// hmac-sha256 data
285: 	auditWrapper, err := c.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, scope.Global.String(), kms.KeyPurposeAudit)
286: 	if err != nil {
287: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error getting audit wrapper from kms: %w", err)
288: 	}
289: 	if err := c.conf.Eventer.RotateAuditWrapper(ctx, auditWrapper); err != nil {
290: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error rotating eventer audit wrapper: %w", err)
291: 	}
292: 	jobRepoFn := func() (*job.Repository, error) {
293: 		return job.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms)
294: 	}
295: 	// TODO: Allow setting run jobs limit from config
296: 	schedulerOpts := []scheduler.Option{scheduler.WithRunJobsLimit(-1)}
297: 	if c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.SchedulerRunJobInterval > 0 {
298: 		schedulerOpts = append(schedulerOpts, scheduler.WithRunJobsInterval(c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.SchedulerRunJobInterval))
299: 	}
300: 	c.scheduler, err = scheduler.New(c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.Name, jobRepoFn, schedulerOpts...)
301: 	if err != nil {
302: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("error creating new scheduler: %w", err)
303: 	}
304: 	c.IamRepoFn = func() (*iam.Repository, error) {
305: 		return iam.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms, iam.WithRandomReader(c.conf.SecureRandomReader))
306: 	}
307: 	c.StaticHostRepoFn = func() (*static.Repository, error) {
308: 		return static.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms)
309: 	}
310: 	c.PluginHostRepoFn = func() (*pluginhost.Repository, error) {
311: 		return pluginhost.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms, c.scheduler, c.conf.HostPlugins)
312: 	}
313: 	c.HostPluginRepoFn = func() (*host.Repository, error) {
314: 		return host.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms)
315: 	}
316: 	c.AuthTokenRepoFn = func() (*authtoken.Repository, error) {
317: 		return authtoken.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms,
318: 			authtoken.WithTokenTimeToLiveDuration(c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.AuthTokenTimeToLiveDuration),
319: 			authtoken.WithTokenTimeToStaleDuration(c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.AuthTokenTimeToStaleDuration))
320: 	}
321: 	c.VaultCredentialRepoFn = func() (*vault.Repository, error) {
322: 		return vault.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms, c.scheduler)
323: 	}
324: 	c.StaticCredentialRepoFn = func() (*credstatic.Repository, error) {
325: 		return credstatic.NewRepository(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms)
326: 	}
327: 	c.ServersRepoFn = func() (*server.Repository, error) {
328: 		return server.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms)
329: 	}
330: 	c.OidcRepoFn = func() (*oidc.Repository, error) {
331: 		return oidc.NewRepository(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms)
332: 	}
333: 	c.PasswordAuthRepoFn = func() (*password.Repository, error) {
334: 		return password.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms)
335: 	}
336: 	c.TargetRepoFn = func(o ...target.Option) (*target.Repository, error) {
337: 		return target.NewRepository(dbase, dbase, c.kms, o...)
338: 	}
339: 	c.SessionRepoFn = func(opt ...session.Option) (*session.Repository, error) {
340: 		return session.NewRepository(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms, opt...)
341: 	}
342: 	c.ConnectionRepoFn = func() (*session.ConnectionRepository, error) {
343: 		return session.NewConnectionRepository(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms)
344: 	}
345: 	c.WorkerAuthRepoStorageFn = func() (*server.WorkerAuthRepositoryStorage, error) {
346: 		return server.NewRepositoryStorage(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms)
347: 	}
348: 
349: 	// Check that credentials are available at startup, to avoid some harmless
350: 	// but nasty-looking errors
351: 	serversRepo, err := server.NewRepositoryStorage(ctx, dbase, dbase, c.kms)
352: 	if err != nil {
353: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to instantiate worker auth repository: %w", err)
354: 	}
355: 	err = server.RotateRoots(ctx, serversRepo)
356: 	if err != nil {
357: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to ensure worker auth roots exist: %w", err)
358: 	}
359: 
360: 	if downstreamersFactory != nil {
361: 		c.downstreamWorkers, err = downstreamersFactory(ctx, "root")
362: 		if err != nil {
363: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to initialize downstream workers graph: %w", err)
364: 		}
365: 		if commandClientFactory != nil {
366: 			err := commandClientFactory(ctx, c)
367: 			if err != nil {
368: 				return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to initialize issue command factory: %w", err)
369: 			}
370: 		}
371: 	}
372: 
373: 	return c, nil
374: }
375: 
376: func (c *Controller) Start() error {
377: 	const op = "controller.(Controller).Start"
378: 	if c.started.Load() {
379: 		event.WriteSysEvent(context.TODO(), op, "already started, skipping")
380: 		return nil
381: 	}
382: 
383: 	c.baseContext, c.baseCancel = context.WithCancel(context.Background())
384: 
385: 	if err := c.registerJobs(); err != nil {
386: 		return fmt.Errorf("error registering jobs: %w", err)
387: 	}
388: 	if err := c.startListeners(); err != nil {
389: 		return fmt.Errorf("error starting controller listeners: %w", err)
390: 	}
391: 
392: 	// Upsert controller before starting tickers and scheduler to ensure the controller exists
393: 	if err := c.upsertController(c.baseContext); err != nil {
394: 		return fmt.Errorf("error upserting controller: %w", err)
395: 	}
396: 	if err := c.scheduler.Start(c.baseContext, c.schedulerWg); err != nil {
397: 		return fmt.Errorf("error starting scheduler: %w", err)
398: 	}
399: 
400: 	c.tickerWg.Add(5)
401: 	go func() {
402: 		defer c.tickerWg.Done()
403: 		c.startStatusTicking(c.baseContext)
404: 	}()
405: 	go func() {
406: 		defer c.tickerWg.Done()
407: 		c.startNonceCleanupTicking(c.baseContext)
408: 	}()
409: 	go func() {
410: 		defer c.tickerWg.Done()
411: 		c.startTerminateCompletedSessionsTicking(c.baseContext)
412: 	}()
413: 	go func() {
414: 		defer c.tickerWg.Done()
415: 		c.startCloseExpiredPendingTokens(c.baseContext)
416: 	}()
417: 	go func() {
418: 		defer c.tickerWg.Done()
419: 		c.started.Store(true)
420: 	}()
421: 
422: 	if c.downstreamRoutes != nil {
423: 		c.tickerWg.Add(1)
424: 		go func() {
425: 			defer c.tickerWg.Done()
426: 			err := c.downstreamRoutes.StartRouteMgmtTicking(
427: 				c.baseContext,
428: 				func() string {
429: 					switch {
430: 					case c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.Name != "":
431: 						return c.conf.RawConfig.Controller.Name
432: 					default:
433: 						return "unknown controller name"
434: 					}
435: 				},
436: 				-1,
437: 			)
438: 			if err != nil {
439: 				errors.Wrap(c.baseContext, err, op)
440: 			}
441: 		}()
442: 	}
443: 	if downstreamWorkersTickerFactory != nil {
444: 		// we'll use "root" to designate that this is the root of the graph (aka
445: 		// a controller)
446: 		dswTicker, err := downstreamWorkersTickerFactory(c.baseContext, "root", c.downstreamWorkers, c.downstreamRoutes)
447: 		if err != nil {
448: 			return fmt.Errorf("error creating downstream workers ticker: %w", err)
449: 		}
450: 		c.tickerWg.Add(1)
451: 		go func() {
452: 			defer c.tickerWg.Done()
453: 			err := dswTicker.StartDownstreamWorkersTicking(c.baseContext, -1)
454: 			if err != nil {
455: 				event.WriteSysEvent(c.baseContext, op, "error starting/running downstream workers ticker", "err", err.Error())
456: 			}
457: 		}()
458: 	}
459: 
460: 	return nil
461: }
462: 
463: func (c *Controller) registerJobs() error {
464: 	rw := db.New(c.conf.Database)
465: 	if err := vault.RegisterJobs(c.baseContext, c.scheduler, rw, rw, c.kms); err != nil {
466: 		return err
467: 	}
468: 	if err := pluginhost.RegisterJobs(c.baseContext, c.scheduler, rw, rw, c.kms, c.conf.HostPlugins); err != nil {
469: 		return err
470: 	}
471: 	if err := session.RegisterJobs(c.baseContext, c.scheduler, rw, rw, c.kms, c.conf.StatusGracePeriodDuration); err != nil {
472: 		return err
473: 	}
474: 	if err := serversjob.RegisterJobs(c.baseContext, c.scheduler, rw, rw, c.kms); err != nil {
475: 		return err
476: 	}
477: 
478: 	return nil
479: }
480: 
481: func (c *Controller) Shutdown() error {
482: 	const op = "controller.(Controller).Shutdown"
483: 	if !c.started.Load() {
484: 		event.WriteSysEvent(context.TODO(), op, "already shut down, skipping")
485: 	}
486: 	defer c.started.Store(false)
487: 	c.baseCancel()
488: 	if err := c.stopServersAndListeners(); err != nil {
489: 		return fmt.Errorf("error stopping controller servers and listeners: %w", err)
490: 	}
491: 	c.schedulerWg.Wait()
492: 	c.tickerWg.Wait()
493: 	if c.conf.Eventer != nil {
494: 		if err := c.conf.Eventer.FlushNodes(context.Background()); err != nil {
495: 			return fmt.Errorf("error flushing controller eventer nodes: %w", err)
496: 		}
497: 	}
498: 	return nil
499: }

502: // controller, not the DB. It's used in tests to verify that a given controller
503: // is receiving updates from an expected set of workers, to test out balancing
504: // and auto reconnection.
505: func (c *Controller) WorkerStatusUpdateTimes() *sync.Map {
506: 	return c.workerStatusUpdateTimes
